results.title: On the Undecidability of Artificial Intelligence Alignment: Machines that Halt
results.snippet: Inner alignment problem undecidable by Rice's theorem and Halting Problem reduction; safety/trust/AGI mutually incompatible.

results.title: Limitations on Safe Trusted AGI
results.snippet: Safety, trust and AGI are mutually incompatible; AI systems solving program verification or planning have fundamental limits.

results.title: Safe Language Generation in the Limit
results.snippet: LDIFF-EMPTY undecidable; safe generation of K\H undecidable even for identifiable K and revealed H.

results.title: Impossibility Results in AI: A Survey
results.snippet: Survey of impossibility results in AI including Rice-theorem-based safety arguments.

results.title: A Self-Improving Coding Agent
results.snippet: Empirical self-improving coding agent that modifies its own scaffolding.

results.title: Semantic Laundering in AI Agent Architectures
results.snippet: Theorem of Inevitable Self-Licensing: circular epistemic justification cannot be eliminated under standard architectural assumptions.
